growth_theory.value: Infrastructure-led development financed through concessional foreign loans targeting health, energy, rural connectivity, and human capital.

source.quote: Cambodia thanks the South Korean Government for granting US$700 million as soft loan for the development of Cambodia for 2019-2023.

time_horizon.value: Medium-term planning horizon aligned with multi-year development frameworks (2019-2023 soft loan coordination).

source.quote: coordination framework on soft loan of Economic Development Cooperation Fund for 2019-2023

dependency_assumptions.value: Reliance on foreign concessional financing (soft loans) and technical partnerships for core infrastructure and institutional development; heavy dependence on bilateral state visits for securing investment commitments.

source.quote: Cambodia thanks the South Korean Government for granting US$700 million as soft loan for the development of Cambodia for 2019-2023.

institution_vs_relationship.value: Relationship-based governance model emphasizing personal bilateral engagement at the highest levels (royal audience, prime ministerial bilateral talks) to formalize cooperation frameworks.

source.quote: H.E. Moon Jae-in and his spouse were received in a royal audience by His Majesty Norodom Sihamoni, King of Cambodia, and after that, the South Korean leader held a bilateral talk with Samdech Techo Hun Sen.

global_positioning_logic.value: Strategic openness to multiple bilateral partnerships with developed economies (South Korea) for capital inflows and technological cooperation while maintaining multi-vector engagement.

source.quote: comprehensive cooperation between the two countries

consistency_score.value: High consistency between stated commitment to comprehensive bilateral cooperation and revealed behavior of formalizing seven cooperation documents including investment facilitation and infrastructure development.

source.quote: Seven cooperation documents were reached during the state visit
